name: the gate catches an enforcement-relevant field that has no declared absent_default
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/z schemas docs && cp "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/schemas/rubric-rule.schema.json" schemas/ && cp "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/consumer-compatibility-contract.md" docs/ && node -e 'const s=require(process.argv[1]);delete s.fields.enforced_by;require("fs").writeFileSync("schemas/field-semantics.json",JSON.stringify(s))' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/schemas/field-semantics.json" && printf 'source:
  id: t
rules:
- id: g-z
  detector: x.sh
  introduced_in: baseline
' > generated-code-quality-standards/z/z.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-consumer-compatibility.sh" --root . 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'surface=absent-default item=enforced_by' e.txt && echo catches-undeclared-field 1>&2
